title: Arc Goggle
shortDescription: An impact resistant lens, that is antifog, antistatic and UV resistant.. A lightweight, soft and durable PVC frame with nose shield for a comfortable  and protective fit and seal on the face.. Indirect ventilation points, protecting the eyes from high speed, high energy  impact particles, liquids and chemicals.

features: An impact resistant lens, that is antifog, antistatic and UV resistant.
A lightweight, soft and durable PVC frame with nose shield for a comfortable  and protective fit and seal on the face.
Indirect ventilation points, protecting the eyes from high speed, high energy  impact particles, liquids and chemicals.
A large fire resistant adjustable headband for easy donning with gloves.
